caption:
"I spent 15 years feeling invisible in my own skin."

Sarah (name used with permission) came to Rani at 44, feeling like the woman in the mirror didn't match the woman she felt like inside.

Her concerns: deepening nasolabial folds, loss of jawline definition, stubborn melasma from years in the sun, and fatigue she couldn't shake no matter how much she slept.

Her customized program:
• Botox for forehead and crow's feet
• Sofwave for jawline and submental tightening
• A series of chemical peels for melasma management
• Comprehensive lab work that revealed vitamin D deficiency and suboptimal thyroid function
• Targeted vitamin injections and HRT optimization

Six months later, she told us: "I don't look different. I look like ME again."

That's the goal. Not a different face. YOUR face—restored, refreshed, and full of the vitality you deserve.

Your story starts with a consultation. Link in bio.
mediaDescription: Testimonial-style carousel: Slide 1 is a beautifully designed quote card with Sarah's words. Slide 2 outlines her treatment plan in elegant typography. Slide 3 shows a silhouette or artistic representation (privacy-preserving). Slide 4 is a final quote about feeling like herself again. Warm, emotional, gold-toned design.
